pi_items.source: Verified via task instructions explicitly requiring the subject to contain 'Global Corp'.
Verified via task instructions explicitly requiring the addition of the emergency hotline number '555-0199' to the message body.
Verified via task instructions requesting the Request ID variable, and setup_task.sh inherently utilizing \$RequestId as the ServiceDesk Plus default.
Verified via task instructions explicitly targeting the 'Acknowledge requester by e-mail when a new request is received' template.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for manageservice_env customize_notification_template task by confirming that the task operates on a fresh install of ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus. Verified that the expected subject text ('Global Corp'), expected body text ('555-0199'), expected target rule ('Acknowledge requester'), and the Request ID variable pattern exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and the setup script reset logic.
